session.task: Scope Insights to workspace + agent filters; fix Traces sidebar order (started_at desc), timestamps, and independent sidebar/main scroll layout.

events.reason: Insights graph is built server-side in api/insights; client-only filters require extending GET() with workspace and session query params and matching trace files to agent workspace roots via repo_snapshot paths.

Extended /api/insights with workspace and session query params, traceSessions list, and graph scoping; added Insights dropdowns; sorted traces sidebar by started_at, parseTraceInstant for UTC-safe timestamps, h-[100dvh] layout with min-h-0 and nested overflow-y for independent scroll regions.
